title: AgentCard
description: AgentCard v1.0 — the self-declaration of an agent's identity, capabilities, and terms. Pure data schema, zero execution logic. AgentCard is to A2A what HTTP headers are to the web.

agent_id.description: Globally unique agent identifier. 128-bit ULID encoded as Crockford Base32 (26 characters, characters 0-9 and A-HJKMNP-TV-Z).

name.description: Human-readable display name of this agent.

version.description: Semantic version of this agent's card format (semver 2.0).

capabilities.description: List of capabilities this agent offers. At least one capability is required.

pricing.description: Optional cost model for interacting with this agent.

metadata.description: Interaction statistics derived from PACR causal history (π projection). These fields are computed from the ledger, not self-declared.

Capability.title: Capability
Capability.description: A single capability that the agent can perform.

id.description: Machine-readable capability identifier. Dot-namespaced recommended: domain.verb

description.description: Human-readable description of what this capability does.

tags.description: Optional semantic tags for discovery and routing.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the input this capability accepts. Null means the input is unstructured.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the output this capability produces. Null means the output is unstructured.

url.description: URL or address of the endpoint.

auth.description: Authentication configuration. Null means no authentication required.

Protocol.title: Protocol
Protocol.description: Transport protocol used to communicate with the agent.

AuthConfig.title: AuthConfig
AuthConfig.description: Authentication configuration for reaching this agent.

header.description: Header name where the credential is sent (for api_key scheme).

PricingModel.title: PricingModel
PricingModel.description: Cost model for interacting with this agent. Thermodynamic settlement is in Joules; fiat settlement is optional.

base_cost_joules.description: Base cost per request in Joules (Landauer thermodynamic unit). This is the canonical unit of account for agent-to-agent settlement. Must be >= 2.854e-21 (Landauer floor at 300K).

estimated_latency_ms.description: Estimated end-to-end latency in milliseconds. Derived from PACR Omega (Ω) history when populated via π projection.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code or token symbol for fiat/token settlement (optional complement to Joule pricing).

cost_per_request.description: Cost per request in the specified fiat/token currency. Only meaningful when 'currency' is also set.

Metadata.title: Metadata
Metadata.description: Metadata derived from PACR causal history via the π projection function. All fields with prefix 'pacr:' are computed from the causal ledger, not self-declared. Custom fields without the 'pacr:' prefix may be set by the agent operator.

pacr:interaction_count.description: Count of PACR records involving this agent_id.

pacr:avg_latency_ms.description: Time-decay-weighted average latency in milliseconds: Σ(Ω.time × exp(-λΔt)) / Σ(exp(-λΔt)).

pacr:avg_cost_joules.description: Time-decay-weighted average energy cost in Joules: Σ(Ω.energy × exp(-λΔt)) / Σ(exp(-λΔt)).

pacr:reputation_score.description: Reputation score in [0.0, 1.0]: f(success_rate, latency, Sτ/Hτ ratio). Higher is better.

pacr:influence_rank.description: PageRank variant on causal interaction graph. Measures how central this agent is to overall system flow.

pacr:critical_score.description: Betweenness centrality score. Higher means more other agents depend on routing through this agent.
